title: App Settings - General - Account - Account delete - dialog
scenario: Account delete dialog appears and matches Figma design when tapping delete icon in General > Account tab in Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
Locate and tap the delete icon (trash/bin icon) on the Account screen.
expected: The Account delete confirmation dialog is displayed and matches the Figma design specifications (correct layout, text, button labels, colors, and spacing).
